summary: M3 evidence vector record schema + exporter delivered. Schema fixture defines required metadata (recordType, runId, sourceId, sourceFamily, sourceLayer, generalIds, locator, textHash, anchorVerdict, canonicalWrites, payloadUri). Exporter reads JSONL manifest, emits anchor_passage and evidence_card records (hardened review statuses only by default), drops raw seed / harvested page / proposal artifacts, and produces a deterministic sha256 over sorted-by-recordId output. 6 smoke tests (13 assertions) pass.

artifacts.description: Vector record schema v0.1: required metadata, anchorVerdict enum (anchored/candidate/unanchored/not-applicable), recordType enum (anchor_passage/evidence_card/event/persona/keyword), textHash sha256 pattern.

export_from_manifest() builds anchor_passage and evidence_card vector records. Drops raw seeds, harvested pages, and proposals. Default skip rule: evidence-card reviewStatus must be in {accepted, staged-a} (override with --allow-candidate-evidence). Records sorted by recordId; deterministic sha256 for anchor + evidence + combined outputs.

6 tests covering: allowed record types, candidate evidence dropped by default, required metadata fields present, deterministic sha256 across two runs, namespace defaults to -smoke when canonicalWrites=False, anchor records sorted by recordId.

Sample export report with recordCounts {anchor_passage:2, evidence_card:1, total:3}, namespace=sanguo-rag-evidence-smoke, deterministicSha256.combined captured. Generated from the smoke fixture with evidence-card review status promoted to accepted.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: evidence vector record schema supports anchor_passage and evidence_card
raw seed not exported by default; only hardened retrieval-ready chunks
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Exporter loop only handles entry.artifact_type in {anchor-passage, evidence-card}; evidence-card requires reviewStatus in {accepted, staged-a}.
_ensure_metadata_fields() asserts required set; smoke test verifies each record has all 11 required keys.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: exporter reads JSONL manifest or PostgreSQL mirror, deterministic sha256
acceptanceMapping.evidence: export_from_manifest() walks manifest.files; records sorted by recordId; _stable_dump() emits sort_keys=True JSON and sha256s the bytes. Smoke test asserts identical sha256 across two runs.

nextActions: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0302: vector smoke namespace ingestion gate consumes this exporter output
SANGUO-RAGOPS-0401: large-run rehearsal includes this exporter in vector-smoke mode
